title: Blade Oil
description: Adds oils that can be applied to weapons, boosting damage against certain mobs
body: ![Blade Oil Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ea233b47b88515b5e6a205c9e6388f93032e5af.png) ## About Blade Oil is species-based poison mod inspired by the Witcher game series. Using various ingredients players are able to create oils which when applied to a weapon, will do additional damage to specific mob types. Oil recipes can be discovered by collecting various items such as plants and mob drops. This mod requires [NModUtils](https://modrinth.com/mod/nmodutils) to function! ## How to Use 1. Craft an oil 2. Pick up the oil with your cursor 3. Right-click on the weapon with the oil ### Demonstration ![How to use Blade Oil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/192725591a3a5cd03ee0b7b7519e9067b7526f3d.gif) ## Mobs Affected by Oil - **Holy Oils** - Undead mobs - **Insectoid Oils** - Arthropod mobs - **Davy Jones Oils** - Aquatic mobs - **Endspawn Oils** - Endermite, Ender Dragon, Enderman, Shulker - **Hanged Man's Venom** - Illagers, Players, Villagers - **Relict Oils** - Allay, Breeze, Creaking, Creeper, Ghast, Slime, Sniffer, Vex, Warden - **Hellspawn Oils** - Blaze, Hoglin, Magma Cube, Piglins, Strider ## Configuration Blade oil properties can be completely configured by editing: `$MC_ROOT/config/bladeoil.json` ### Properties - **Damage** - how much additional damage an oiled weapon does - **Quality** - how many hits the effect will last before the weapon will need to be reoiled - **Amount** - how many uses an oil bottle has before it is completely depleted. ## Default Damage ### Most Oils - **Basic Oil**: 4 Damage (2 Hearts) - **Enhanced Oil**: 8 Damage (4 Hearts) - **Superior Oil**: 12 Damage (6 Hearts) ### Hanged Man's Venom - **Basic Oil**: 2 Damage (1 Hearts) - **Enhanced Oil**: 4 Damage (2 Hearts) - **Superior Oil**: 8 Damage (4 Hearts)
